title: LIKE join: BATfetchjoin does not hit always
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'example', 'This is an example entry');
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id Int32, join_name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY join_id;
SELECT * FROM test_table JOIN join_table ON test_table.name LIKE join_table.join_name;
key_bug_features: LIKE join with variable does not always return results
